title: 1981-04-16_Pat_154.txt
key_claims: Reversing his previous stance, Dick claims the "Plasmate" isn't Christ; it is actually an occluding "info life form" posing as the universe to enslave humans. In 1974, he saw this occluding structure, not true reality.

The novel *VALIS* is 50% right and 50% wrong: it accurately describes the universe as information, but errs by identifying that information as divine, when it is actually a Satanic/Torah-based entrapment mechanism.
Humans are fragments of primal man (Christ) who were beguiled by the beauty of this living info (the "Titans' toys") and forgot their true identity.
Suffering, empathy, and vicarious sacrifice are the antidotes to this beguilement, restoring the original Christ nature latent within humanity.
recurring_concepts: **The Information Virus**: The idea that the universe we experience is not matter, but a highly intelligent, living information system that actively misleads and hypnotizes us.
reading_excerpt: Reversing his previous stance, Dick claims the "Plasmate" isn't Christ; it is actually an occluding "info life form" posing as the universe to enslave humans. In 1974, he saw this occluding structure, not true reality.
